title: Dashboard widget with board items sorted by date
excerpt: I have a Board that contains a list of upcoming tasks.  I want to create a simple Dashboard for that Board that shows each task ordered by the task Expected Completion date.  The Table widget allows me to show the tasks,…

posts.author: TestingMonday (Jay Burgess)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a Board that contains a list of upcoming tasks. I want to create a simple Dashboard for that Board that shows each task ordered by the task Expected Completion date. The Table widget allows me to show the tasks, but I cannot figure out how to also define “ordered by”. Can you explain how I do this, or suggest a different widget. Thanks!
